original_text:
### Accessibility (brand-mandated)
- Body copy **≥16px**; bigger is better.
- Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
- Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.
- Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.
- Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.
- Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop. **[GENERAL email]:** animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.
- Media: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.
- Reference standard: WCAG (wcag.com).

quotes: Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.
Line height **≥150%**; more for light-on-dark text.
Use a type scale for visual hierarchy.
Test contrast; never rely on color alone; proof all text for legibility.

rules.intent: Ensure legible, WCAG-aligned text for all readers.
rules.rule_text: Brand-mandated accessibility: body copy must be ≥16px (body.type = 16px; bigger is better); line height must be ≥150% (body.line_height minimum 150%), with more for light-on-dark text (up to 160%); use a type scale for visual hierarchy. Test contrast (body minimum 4.5:1), never rely on color alone, and proof all text for legibility.

quotes: Forms: labels always visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets **≥48px**.

rules.intent: Accessible, operable form controls and touch targets.
rules.rule_text: Forms: labels must always be visible (no placeholder-as-label, no disappearing labels); click/tap targets must be ≥48px (button min touch size 48px).

quotes: no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback
Animations: quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to "pause" effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop.
animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s without a static fallback.

rules.intent: Prevent motion-related barriers and ensure Outlook first-frame legibility.
rules.rule_text: Animations: use quick transitions that don't interrupt flow; avoid excessive motion; provide a way to 'pause' effects; design for phone, tablet, and desktop. [GENERAL email]: animated GIFs must carry the key message in frame 1 (Outlook shows only the first frame); no autoplaying motion longer than ~5s (email.gif.max_autoplay ≈5s) without a static fallback.

quotes: descriptive **alt text** on all images; transcripts available for any video or audio.

rules.intent: Ensure non-text content has accessible equivalents per WCAG.
rules.rule_text: Media: provide descriptive alt text on all images; transcripts must be available for any video or audio. Reference standard: WCAG (wcag.com).
